creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
Thanks, but we already have:

print/py-reportlab
print/py-reportlab2

You may want to submit an update to 2.5 for the latter port instead.
Before going to the trouble of creating a port and a PR, it is a good
idea to run "make search" in /usr/ports, to see if it already exists.

b.
